info.title: docker-watch
info.description: 🐳-⌚, A command line utiltiy to notify docker mounted volumes about changes on Windows.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Notify docker containers about changes in mounted volumes.

options.name: --container
options.description: Glob pattern to filter containers. Without providing a pattern, notifiers will get attached to each running container.

options.name: --nogitignore
options.description: Enable or disable filtering sync changes based on gitignore file

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable more verbose and rich logging.
